title: Mossel Bay woman celebrates her 99th birthday
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   Mossel Bay resident...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -   Mossel Bay resident Annette Sophia Kiewiet celebrated her 99th birthday on Monday 2 February.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay resident Annette Sophia Kiewiet celebrated her 99th birthday on Monday 2 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her family and Mossel Bay’s Mayor Dirk Kotzé all attended the occasion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kiewiet was born in 1927 and grew up in Sorgfontein, near Friemersheim.","html":"Kiewiet was born in 1927 and grew up in Sorgfontein, near Friemersheim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She would later meet her husband, Samuel, at a dance in Friemersheim where he was performing as a musician.","html":"She would later meet her husband, Samuel, at a dance in Friemersheim where he was performing as a musician."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They married in 1945, and welcoming 13 children - seven daughters and six sons - throughout their marriage.","html":"They married in 1945, and welcoming 13 children - seven daughters and six sons - throughout their marriage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In 1963, the family relocated to Voorbaai, and in 1969, they settled in Mossel Bay, first in Ext 8 and later in Ext 13.","html":"In 1963, the family relocated to Voorbaai, and in 1969, they settled in Mossel Bay, first in Ext 8 and later in Ext 13."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sadly, four of her daughters and two of her sons have passed away. Her husband died in 1993.","html":"Sadly, four of her daughters and two of her sons have passed away. Her husband died in 1993."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Annette has primarily been a homemaker, devoted to caring for her family. Her hobbies include cooking, baking and gardening, and she has a passion for singing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For many years, she sang in the choir of the Uniting Reformed Church in Mossel Bay and has been an active member of the church’s Women’s Fellowship.","html":"For many years, she sang in the choir of the Uniting Reformed Church in Mossel Bay and has been an active member of the church’s Women’s Fellowship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Annette is also a grandmother to 33 grandchildren, 75 great-grandchildren and 17 great-great-grandchildren.","html":"Annette is also a grandmother to 33 grandchildren, 75 great-grandchildren and 17 great-great-grandchildren."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Annette Sophia Kiewiet. Photo: Supplied","html":"Annette Sophia Kiewiet. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
